title: Assertion fault on a join with a repeated column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, age INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), ('Charlie', 25);
SELECT u.name, o.amount, u.age FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;
key_bug_features: Join operation with a repeated column
